message:
feat(fp-frame): add dt.round, SeriesGroupBy var/median/prod, Series.replace_regex

- DatetimeAccessor::round(freq): round to nearest frequency boundary
- SeriesGroupBy::var/median/prod: group-level variance, median, and product
- Series::replace_regex: regex-based string value replacement

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
